speaker: MATT
raw_text: 24. You take about five minutes or so to concentrate, and while the distance and direction is relatively the same, there is very faint movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Learn from my mistakes."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why are they so singed? All right. Okay, let's focus up. Okay. Go on, strategize.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Time! We don't have a lot of time. So what are we going to do with it? Are we going to get allies? Are we going to talk to Allura again? Gilmore?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ooh, wait. First things first, do we know where he is? Don't you have the ability to like--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah. Is he still in the same place?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know in here; I need to shove my head out the door for a sec.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, shove your head out the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As you emerge into the heated air of the sub-ocean volcano, you take a moment and concentrate and you can sense the direction and distance seems to be approximately the same.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He hasn't moved at all?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check, I guess.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. Finishing your wine, you all scatter to your various rooms throughout the mansion, prepare yourselves for an evening's rest. In the morning, journey to the cradle of civilization, Vasselheim.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, we've sent some word out to the world.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We've sent messages to Tary and to who else? There were two messages sent.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Tary, the Ashari.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Kaylie. I think.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We activated the beacons.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We activated the Chaos Orbs. Crisis Orbs. I always mess them up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: So we should rest and head to Vasselheim?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're not any good to anybody at the moment, so I imagine so.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think we'll all feel better after a night's sleep. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan, where are you sleeping tonight?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: In my room.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do we need to post guards outside?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have all the guards I need. Don't worry, I'll be safe.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're not worried about you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It'll be fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It'll be fine!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) It'll be great.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So we're going to sleep and then to Vasselheim?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We rest and then we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's the plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, let's do it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. With that, you close your eyes. Beneath your breath, you recite the incantation. With that, you feel your body suddenly sucked into a dark void and thrust through the absence of space. And within a moment's time, before you can adjust to the sudden cold and dark vacuous void around you, your feet hit hard ground, your eyes focus again to the light, and you glance around and the center streets, not actually directly at the Trial Forge-- ooh, we got music, finally. In the streets around the Braving Grounds, you can see the smokestacks from the Trial Forge over the distance. You also notice that the sky above you is deep, dark gray clouds. It's as if there is a perpetual eclipse placed upon this ground. You look around in all directions, and you see this roiling gray cloud cluster that encompasses the entirety of the sky above you, which should be mid-morning or midday. It's blotted out by the storm-- rainfall is absent-- and you see flashes of light, occasionally framing strange shapes and clouds. Whether by illusion or by a trick of your mind, you swear you see shifting darkness and forms, images in the clouds: giant faces silently screaming, hundreds of feet across, that extend and push out of the clouds and draw back into the sky. Massive hands that push against them, only to slowly recede moments later. You blink and they're gone, leaving you unsettled regardless and uncertain as to whether or not that was just you or if everyone can see this. As your focus shifts from the sky above, you look around and you can see Bastions are stationed all across the perimeter walls of Vasselheim. You see large ballistae mounted and armed as watchers scour the distant horizon on all sides looking for any sign of something in the distance making its way towards the city, based on the warning you previously gave. Unlit beacons sit at every major structure and juncture of the stone walls, awaiting the burning sign that an assault is spotted. Militia and armored guard move with haste to stations across the city quarters. You can feel the air of war permeating the streets. The streets are far emptier than you recall, the stragglers returning to their homes with carts full of rations, produce, and weapons. Fear grips their face as they pass by. You glance off to your left, and you can see a wiry old man in the corner, his tangled silver and blond hair bouncing with fervor, as he shouts out, "The reckoning of our opulence has come! The gods are away and the price of our hubris comes to consume us." But no one's paying him mind. His tattered bones jangling his knees across each other, as he makes his way through the streets, his face a glance of utter despair. You notice an argument between two Bastions and a middle-aged bearded man who is painting a familiar symbol on his front door, not too far from where you stand. A five-year-old girl cries and clings to his leg. What do you do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, I feel it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Up and out to it. Up the volcano, up the water--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you know what? Don't worry about it, let's go. Let's just Plane Shift.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's an arduous journey back to any possible tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Wanted to talk that one out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I Plane Shift us to Vasselheim.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you Plane Shift to Vasselheim. As you guys encircle your hands once more, Keyleth, you focus on whereabouts in Vasselheim?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The Trial Forge?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Or Melora's tree maybe? (laughter and applause)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Residual magic.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Trial Forge?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Where will you not get arrested?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No one's going to even notice me. Yeah, they were ringing the bells and running around and getting prepared and stuff. Yeah, and if for some reason, somebody's like, "That guy punched me in the face," we'll just punch them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I agree with this plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Trial Forge.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Right now. She left not but an hour ago."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If we're going to make a sun appear--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's do it at the temple of Sarenrae or the temple of Pelor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: All right, we go to the temple of Sarenrae!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You make your way to the temple. You enter the interior, and you can see most everyone is in silent prayer. They're all either holding hands or clutching close their smaller kin, these renewed worshippers of the Everlight. Glancing around, you don't see Pike currently in the vicinity. All you see is one of the head priests, Coraline, who's currently off to the side is tending to a few of the folks from the interior.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Pike?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Coraline looks over and sees you guys enter. "Oh!" Rushes up to you. "I'm sorry, she's not here, she went to the Platinum Sanctuary. Apparently, there's a discussion, a meeting of some kind."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Right now?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "It, in the past 12 hours or so, has stretched across the Ozmit Sea and now seeks to consume as far as the east coast of Tal'Dorei. If this is what I believe it is, within the next half-to-full day the entirety of Exandria will be under the shaded sky of Vecna."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Allura, does the sky look like this in Emon?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: There are two places in the Zenwick Mountains that would be of any interest, or historical lore-based elements. There is the Crypts of Thomara: it's a subterranean vault city, built around a precious metal vein cluster by the xenophobic dwarven Thomara clan in the early years of the Age of Arcana. It's said a terrible madness fed into their greed, leading to eventual cannibalism and collapse of the society thousands of years ago. It's now considered cursed and is largely avoided. The other location is known as the Silted Veil, a small, cold valley within the mountains that is comprised of ice-dusted, mineral-rich mud that was once rumored to carry natural healing properties when applied to wounds and restorative elements to aged skin. However, a large variety of dangerous creatures also discovered these features over time and moved into the valley, taking over and establishing a new violent ecosystem based around the soothing muck. Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What's a fair amount?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you feel confident in your ability to understand history. I would say putting it this way, those who have researched the lands that would probably be Percival and Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 27? Okay! I'll make part of this a whisper.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, you'll make what? I didn't hear it!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A live whisper.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: We'll take our break here. We'll return at that moment here in a number of minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! We're mostly really good at that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If you indeed carry the boons that your lady Pike has mentioned, then we need to keep Vecna and his force occupied to grant you entry. And we can do that. I certainly hope with the strength of our numbers that there is no way that he can see them coming. From the distant end of the central chamber here, a familiar voice echoes throughout the hallway. Oh, but I do, wyrm groveler."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But the ring, man! We just got the ring!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You haven't attuned to it yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And with that, we're going to go ahead and take our break. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Come on!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What all did we say?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What didn't we say?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What a piece of shit!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "It has been foreseen!" I've been working on my costume.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I am doing a nature check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, to find out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: If it looks like a path has been bore through in a straight line, like it looks like it's going through. 24.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 24? What you can tell from a nature check is that these are not natural formations in the ground. These are blunt trauma to the ground that has caused these large craters.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does it look like a walking path? A very large walking path?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Percival?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20, for 25.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 19 total.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Percival. And Keyleth. And Perc'ahlia. Not you Grog, sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Holes!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do notice, upon immediate view, that these large holes are patterned, staggered about every 350-400 feet. And they do almost present the gait of a walking creature.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (anguished sounds)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey! You got that big fucking turtle you wanted!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It is a giant turtle!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The final miniature is just Matt.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Thank you," you hear emanate from J'mon as the cloud cover tends to spread a little bit and give a little bit of a good view. You travel on for about 25, 30 or so minutes before Vex, Vax, and Keyleth, you glance around the bend of the pass that you've just begun to curve around, and you see it: an impossibly immense entity, standing hundreds and hundreds of feet tall. A gigantic, bulky mass of jagged rock, slowly walking on two castle-width legs, each footfall sending a cloud-spray of earth into the air around it. (crashing) Quaking the surrounding lands with a terrifying crack and rumble. As the back leg lifts, sifting through the air, you can almost hear the air tear with a high-pitched whine, even at this distance, as its sheer mass and speed in which it's cutting through, breaking the atmosphere, slams down for its next step. (crashing) As you get a better view, the closer you get, it resembles the earth elemental form you've seen Keyleth take many times, only proportionally malformed, and terrifying on a scale you've never seen. Four colossal arms swing from its torso, battering rams of shifting stone, each over 150 feet wide. The closer you get, Grog, you sense a faint vibration in the Titanstone Knuckles.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do a bit of a Gust spell ahead of us to clear the path, give him a little more visual line of sight.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, so you point this out to J'mon? All right. You hear the dragon voice boom up once more. "Hold on!" Goes into an intense dive trying to bring-- because previously you were about level, if not a little higher than Thar Amphala on the top of the entity. J'mon goes into a dive towards the hip area that you point out. The wind is pushing past you. You're holding on for dear life because any possible loss of grip not only is going to loose you from the dragon, which is going to be hard to find you, as you're all invisible, depending on the dragon's abilities, I guess. But as you begin to push down into this dive, I want you all to make strength saving throws, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it coming from the city or coming from the titan?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From the titan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He's leaking from the back of his calf.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's go in there, then.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: From the back of his hip.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's see if we can land on that burst pimple, then.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't think there's any landing. I think there's going to be-- yeah. But you know what? Let's see what happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's fly in close to that waterfall.
